name: get_employee
description: Look up an employee record by employee id (format EMP-NNNN). Returns name, department, role and vacation-day balances including days remaining this year.

name: list_departments
description: List all departments with their head and headcount.

name: check_calendar
description: Check the team calendar for conflicts in a date range (format YYYY-MM-DD..YYYY-MM-DD).

name: create_payout
description: Create an expense payout for an employee (finance write action — policy gated).
